title: Throat Pain Solutions: 10 Herbal Teas for Musicians
description: Glycyrrhiza glabra teas, also known as licorice root tea, has been used for centuries to soothe throat pain. The tea's active compounds, including glycyrrhizin and flavonoids, have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that help to reduce swelling and combat infections in the throat. These properties also help to reduce pain and discomfort associated with sore throats, such as those caused by viral or bacterial infections, allergies, or acid reflux.
